short_description: High CPU utilization on database server
description: Production database server experiencing sustained CPU usage at 92% for 15 minutes causing query performance degradation
close_notes: Issue was caused by unoptimized query with missing table indexes. Root cause analysis identified 3 queries accounting for 78% of CPU usage.
resolution_notes: Added composite indexes on frequently queried columns. Optimized query plans and analyzed execution statistics. Implemented query result caching for common reports. Load testing confirmed performance improvement to baseline.

description: Application unable to obtain database connections from pool, causing cascading timeouts and service unavailability for 45 minutes
close_notes: Root cause was a connection leak in the authentication service. Connections were not being properly returned to the pool after failed authentications.
resolution_notes: Fixed connection leak in auth service code. Increased max connection pool size from 50 to 100 as temporary mitigation. Deployed code fix and monitored connection pool utilization. Implemented connection timeout alerts.

description: Auth service memory usage growing continuously, reaching 4GB heap limit and triggering OOM killer after 8 hours
close_notes: Memory leak identified in token cache that was not properly evicting expired tokens. Cache grew unbounded over time.
resolution_notes: Implemented LRU eviction policy on token cache with 15 minute TTL. Added memory monitoring dashboard. Deployed service restart monitoring for automatic recovery. Performance testing confirmed memory stabilization.

description: API gateway p99 response time increased to 2500ms, significantly impacting user experience and causing request timeouts
close_notes: Issue caused by cascading timeouts from slow database queries. One backend database instance was responding slowly due to high disk I/O.
resolution_notes: Identified slow disk I/O on database server. Optimized indexes and query plans. Implemented circuit breaker to prevent cascading failures. Added rate limiting at API gateway level. Monitored p99 latency after fix.

description: Production database experiencing sudden CPU spike to 95% during business hours, impacting all dependent services
close_notes: Slow running batch job was scheduled during peak hours, consuming all available CPU resources.
resolution_notes: Rescheduled batch job to off-peak hours (11pm). Optimized batch job queries by adding indexes. Implemented resource quotas per batch job. Added CPU spike monitoring and alerting.

description: App server memory usage hitting 95% of available heap, causing performance degradation and garbage collection pauses lasting up to 5 seconds
close_notes: Large dataset was being loaded into memory for processing, causing heap pressure. GC was unable to keep up with allocation rate.
resolution_notes: Refactored data processing to use streaming instead of loading entire dataset. Increased heap size from 2GB to 4GB. Optimized object allocation patterns. Implemented memory profiling and monitoring.
